title: [Nyessem, Testing Module Exit]
description: Two sides of this room are draped in unadorned violet banners, hung in close proximity.  The far wall has been replaced with a square-shaped portal, the surface of which is aglow with wavering energies that change in color from a pale violet indigo to bright sunflower, and then back again.  Set in the portal's apex is a large rune-etched diamond that gently pulsates, lit with a pearlescent, blurry radiance.  Across large areas of white stone floor, many large cushions have been placed.  There is also a conspicuous circular tube next to the portal.
